title: bombax costatum var. houardii
intro: Bombax costatum var. houardii, also known as the Siam Cotton or Bombax houardii, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its showy flowers and cotton-like seeds. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Bombax costatum var. houardii include reducing inflammation, fighting against infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
